expected_issues.description: Amount uses children: string for its content, copied from Badge. Currency semantics require a typed number passed via a named prop. It should be value: number — not children.

hasDecimals and hasTextPostfix are two mutually exclusive booleans — only one display mode applies at a time. Two overlapping booleans should be replaced by a single enum: suffix: 'none' | 'decimals' | 'humanize'.

fontWeight: 'bold' | 'regular' is redundant because the size prop encodes weight in its token name (e.g. 'heading-large-bold'). Exposing fontWeight separately creates impossible states like size='heading-large-bold' fontWeight='regular'.
Props contrast: 'low' | 'high' and screenSize were copied from Badge and do not apply to Amount. Stale template content should be removed before proposing an API.
